title: DonutSMP Rules GUI
body: ## Overview A Fully customizable DonutSMP inspired RulesGUI. Create the best viewable rules gui on your server with this plugin! The best way to implement the rules and make sure everyone will now about them! Freely customizable via the config.yml. ### Features - /rules command - Customizable item materials - Customizable item names - Customizable item lores ( Avaliable to freely customize your rules ) - Fully supports minimessage formats - Impossible to get the items from the GUI ### Config.yml ![config.yml](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb743c3a76de4a1231dec9936c8c001293707c0f.png) ### Media ![Rules GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/140d506344e2e67da7126ee08e4cd34869ed8e7c.png)
